sqlMap.sql:
SELECT RESULT.* FROM ( SELECT MAIN.CN, MAIN.FOLDER_TYPE AS TYPE, MAIN.COMPANY_ID, MAIN.TENANT_ID,
MAIN.FOLDER_NAME1 AS DISPLAY_NAME, COMPANY_JOIN.DISPLAYNAME AS COMPANY_NAME, DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME AS DEPARTMENT_NAME, USERMASTER.TITLE AS JOB_TITLE,
MAIN.FOLDER_NAME2 AS DISPLAY_NAME, COMPANY_JOIN.DISPLAYNAME2 AS COMPANY_NAME, DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME2 AS DEPARTMENT_NAME, USERMASTER.TITLE2 AS JOB_TITLE,
NVL( CUSTOM_CONFIG.TOTAL_CAPACITY, NVL( CASE WHEN MAIN.FOLDER_TYPE = 'U' THEN CONFIG.USER_TOTAL_LIMIT WHEN MAIN.FOLDER_TYPE = 'D' THEN CONFIG.DEPARTMENT_TOTAL_LIMIT WHEN MAIN.FOLDER_TYPE = 'C' THEN CONFIG.COMPANY_TOTAL_LIMIT END, NVL( CASE WHEN MAIN.FOLDER_TYPE = 'U' THEN TENANT_DEFAULT_CONFIG.USER_TOTAL_LIMIT WHEN MAIN.FOLDER_TYPE = 'D' THEN TENANT_DEFAULT_CONFIG.DEPARTMENT_TOTAL_LIMIT WHEN MAIN.FOLDER_TYPE = 'C' THEN TENANT_DEFAULT_CONFIG.COMPANY_TOTAL_LIMIT END, 0 ) ) ) AS TOTAL_CAPACITY, ( SELECT NVL(SUM(FILES.FILE_SIZE), 0) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE FILES JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER FOLDER2 ON FILES.TENANT_ID = FOLDER2.TENANT_ID AND FILES.FOLDER_ID = FOLDER2.FOLDER_ID WHERE FILES.TENANT_ID = FOLDER.TENANT_ID AND ( ( FOLDER2.FOLDER_PATH LIKE FOLDER.FOLDER_PATH || '%' AND FILES.USE_STATUS = 'Y' )
OR ( FILE.DELETER_ID = MAIN.CN AND FILE.USE_STATUS <> 'Y' )
) ) AS TOTAL_USED FROM
( SELECT CN, 'C' AS FOLDER_TYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, DISPLAYNAME AS FOLDER_NAME1, DISPLAYNAME2 AS FOLDER_NAME2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND DEPTLEVEL = 1
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
) MAIN
( SELECT CN, 'D' AS FOLDER_TYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, DISPLAYNAME AS FOLDER_NAME1, DISPLAYNAME2 AS FOLDER_NAME2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
) MAIN
( SELECT CN, 'U' AS FOLDER_TYPE, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, DISPLAYNAME AS FOLDER_NAME1, DISPLAYNAME2 AS FOLDER_NAME2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
) MAIN
LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER FOLDER ON FOLDER.TENANT_ID = MAIN.TENANT_ID AND FOLDER.OWNER_ID = MAIN.CN AND FOLDER.FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' AND FOLDER.FOLDER_TYPE = MAIN.FOLDER_TYPE LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG TENANT_DEFAULT_CONFIG ON MAIN.TENANT_ID = TENANT_DEFAULT_CONFIG.TENANT_ID AND TENANT_DEFAULT_CONFIG.COMPANY_ID = '*' LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG CONFIG ON CONFIG.COMPANY_ID = MAIN.COMPANY_ID AND CONFIG.TENANT_ID = MAIN.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_USER CUSTOM_CONFIG ON MAIN.FOLDER_TYPE <> 'C' AND CUSTOM_CONFIG.CN = MAIN.CN AND CUSTOM_CONFIG.TYPE = MAIN.FOLDER_TYPE AND CUSTOM_CONFIG.TENANT_ID = MAIN.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER USERMASTER ON MAIN.FOLDER_TYPE = 'U' AND MAIN.CN = USERMASTER.CN AND MAIN.TENANT_ID = USERMASTER.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER DEPTMASTER ON MAIN.TENANT_ID = DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID AND ( ( MAIN.FOLDER_TYPE = 'U' AND USERMASTER.DEPARTMENT = DEPTMASTER.CN ) OR ( MAIN.FOLDER_TYPE <> 'U' AND MAIN.CN = DEPTMASTER.CN )) LEFT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER COMPANY_JOIN ON MAIN.COMPANY_ID = COMPANY_JOIN.CN AND COMPANY_JOIN.DEPTLEVEL = 1 AND MAIN.TENANT_ID = COMPANY_JOIN.TENANT_ID ) RESULT

WHERE l.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND l.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
t.TYPE_NAME = 'document'
t.TYPE_NAME = 'music'
t.TYPE_NAME = 'video'
t.TYPE_NAME = 'image'
t.TYPE_NAME = 'zip'
t.TYPE_NAME is null
(LOWER(l.FILE_EXT) LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', LOWER(#fileExt#)), '%') ESCAPE '\')
l.FILE_NAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #fileName#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
l.CREATE_NAME1 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #userName#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
l.CREATE_NAME2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #userName#), '%') ESCAPE '\'
(l.CREATE_DATE >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND l.CREATE_DATE <= TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'))
l.LOG_TYPE = #actionType#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(CN) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #companyId# AND DEPTLEVEL = 1 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG WHERE COMPANY_ID = '*' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG SET UPLOAD_LIMIT = #uploadLimit#, COMPANY_TOTAL_LIMIT = #companyLimit#, DEPARTMENT_TOTAL_LIMIT = #departmentLimit#, USER_TOTAL_LIMIT = #userLimit# WHERE COMPANY_ID = '*' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG SET UPLOAD_LIMIT = #uploadLimit#, COMPANY_TOTAL_LIMIT = #companyLimit#, DEPARTMENT_TOTAL_LIMIT = #departmentLimit#, USER_TOTAL_LIMIT = #userLimit# WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

sqlMap.select: SELECT CONFIG.TENANT_ID, CONFIG.COMPANY_ID, CONFIG.UPLOAD_LIMIT, CONFIG.COMPANY_TOTAL_LIMIT, CONFIG.DEPARTMENT_TOTAL_LIMIT, CONFIG.USER_TOTAL_LIMIT FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG CONFIG WHERE CONFIG.COMPANY_ID = '*' AND CONFIG.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT ALLCOMPANY.TENANT_ID, #companyId# AS COMPANY_ID, NVL(CONFIG.UPLOAD_LIMIT, ALLCOMPANY.UPLOAD_LIMIT) AS UPLOAD_LIMIT, NVL(CONFIG.COMPANY_TOTAL_LIMIT, ALLCOMPANY.COMPANY_TOTAL_LIMIT) AS COMPANY_TOTAL_LIMIT, NVL(CONFIG.DEPARTMENT_TOTAL_LIMIT, ALLCOMPANY.DEPARTMENT_TOTAL_LIMIT) AS DEPARTMENT_TOTAL_LIMIT, NVL(CONFIG.USER_TOTAL_LIMIT, ALLCOMPANY.USER_TOTAL_LIMIT) AS USER_TOTAL_LIMIT FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG ALLCOMPANY LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG CONFIG ON CONFIG.TENANT_ID = ALLCOMPANY.TENANT_ID AND CONFIG.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# WHERE ALLCOMPANY.COMPANY_ID = '*' AND ALLCOMPANY.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT USERS.COMPANY_ID, USERS.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_USER USERS WHERE USERS.CN = #cn# AND USERS.TYPE = #type# AND USERS.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_USER SET TOTAL_CAPACITY = #value# WHERE CN = #cn# AND TYPE = #type# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT CONFIG.COMPANY_ID, CONFIG.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG CONFIG WHERE CONFIG.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND CONFIG.COMPANY_ID = #cn# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG SET COMPANY_TOTAL_LIMIT = #value# WHERE COMPANY_ID = #cn# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

delete.isEqual:
UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG SET COMPANY_TOTAL_LIMIT = NULL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID IN
#list[]#
delete.isNotEqual:
DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_USER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TYPE = #type# AND CN IN
#list[]#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT RESULT2.*, ROWNUM AS RNUM FROM (
ORDER BY $realColumn$ $order$, DEPARTMENT_NAME ASC, DISPLAY_NAME ASC
ORDER BY DEPARTMENT_NAME ASC, DISPLAY_NAME ASC
) RESULT2 WHERE ROWNUM <= #startPoint# + #pageSize# ) WHERE RNUM >= #startPoint# + 1

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_USER WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_USER SET TOTAL_CAPACITY = #totalCapacity# WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_LOG l LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE t ON l.FILE_EXT = t.FILE_EXT AND l.TENANT_ID = t.TENANT_ID

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT LOG_ID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_LOG WHERE LOG_ID = #logId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# )
insert.isEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_LOG ( LOG_ID, FILE_TYPE, FILE_NAME, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, LOG_TYPE, CREATE_ID, CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2, CREATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #logId#, #fileType#, #fileName#, #fileSize#, #fileExt#, #logType#, #createId#, #createName1#, #createName2#, TO_DATE(#createDate#,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss'), #companyId#, #tenantId# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_LOG SET FILE_TYPE = #fileType#, FILE_NAME = #fileName#, FILE_SIZE = #fileSize#, FILE_EXT = #fileExt#, LOG_TYPE = #logType#, CREATE_ID = #createId#, CREATE_NAME1 = #createName1#, CREATE_NAME2 = #createName2#, CREATE_DATE = TO_DATE(#createDate#,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss'), COMPANY_ID = #companyId# WHERE LOG_ID = #logId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT FOLDER_ID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# )
insert.isEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER ( FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME1, FOLDER_NAME2, FOLDER_TYPE, FOLDER_PATH, FOLDER_STEP, FOLDER_LEVEL, FOLDER_UPPER, USE_STATUS, OWNER_ID, CREATE_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2, UPDATE_ID, UPDATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID, DELETER_ID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #folderId#, #folerName1#, #folerName2#, #folderType#, #folderPath#, #folderStep#, #folderLevel#, #folderUpper#, #useStatus#, #ownerId#, #createId#, TO_DATE(#createDate#,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss'), #createName1#, #createName2#, #updateId#, TO_DATE(#updateDate#,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss'), #companyId#, #deleterId#, #tenantId# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER SET FOLDER_NAME1 = #folerName1#, FOLDER_NAME2 = #folerName2#, FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType#, FOLDER_PATH = #folderPath#, FOLDER_STEP = #folderStep#, FOLDER_LEVEL = #folderLevel#, FOLDER_UPPER = #folderUpper#, USE_STATUS = #useStatus#, OWNER_ID = #ownerId#, CREATE_ID = #createId#, CREATE_DATE = TO_DATE(#createDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), CREATE_NAME1 = #createName1#, CREATE_NAME2 = #createName2#, UPDATE_ID = #updateId#, UPDATE_DATE = TO_DATE(#updateDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), COMPANY_ID = #companyId#, DELETER_ID = #deleterId# WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT FOLDER_ID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE OWNER_ID = #ownerId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# )
insert.isEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER ( FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME1, FOLDER_NAME2, FOLDER_TYPE, FOLDER_PATH, FOLDER_STEP, FOLDER_LEVEL, FOLDER_UPPER, USE_STATUS, OWNER_ID, CREATE_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2, UPDATE_ID, UPDATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #folderId#, #folerName1#, #folerName2#, #folderType#, #folderPath#, #folderStep#, #folderLevel#, #folderUpper#, #useStatus#, #ownerId#, #createId#, TO_DATE(#createDate#,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss'), #createName1#, #createName2#, #updateId#, TO_DATE(#updateDate#,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss'), #companyId#, #tenantId# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER SET FOLDER_NAME1 = #folerName1#, FOLDER_NAME2 = #folerName2#, UPDATE_ID = #updateId#, UPDATE_DATE = TO_DATE(#updateDate#,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss'), DELETER_ID = #deleterId# WHERE FOLDER_NAME1 = #folerName1# AND FOLDER_NAME2 = #folerName2# AND OWNER_ID = #ownerId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT SEQ_ID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER WHERE SEQ_ID = #seqId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# )
insert.isEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER ( SEQ_ID, USER_ID, USER_TYPE, FOLDER_ID, CREATE_ID, CREATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #seqId#, #userId#, #userType#, #folderId#, #createId#, TO_DATE(#createDate#,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss'), #companyId#, #tenantId# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER SET USER_ID = #userId#, USER_TYPE = #userType#, FOLDER_ID = #folderId#, CREATE_ID = #createId#, CREATE_DATE = TO_DATE(#createDate#,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss'), COMPANY_ID = #companyId# WHERE SEQ_ID = #seqId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER WHERE USER_ID = #userId# AND USER_TYPE = 'chief' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_webfolder_folder SET FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType#, UPDATE_DATE = TO_DATE(#updateTime#,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss'), UPDATE_ID = #userId#, OWNER_ID = #ownerId#, FOLDER_PATH = replace(FOLDER_PATH, #oldPath#, #newPath#), FOLDER_LEVEL = FOLDER_LEVEL + #levelDistance# WHERE FOLDER_PATH like concat(concat(#oldPath#, '_'), '%') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(SUM(f.FILE_SIZE), 0) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE f JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER u ON f.TENANT_ID = u.TENANT_ID AND f.FOLDER_ID = u.FOLDER_ID WHERE u.FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#folderPath#, '%') AND f.USE_STATUS = 'Y' AND f.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
